chunks.title: Webhook signatures
chunks.text: Every webhook payload is signed with HMAC SHA-256. Verify the X-Acme-Signature header against your endpoint secret before processing events.

chunks.title: Webhook retries
chunks.text: Failed webhook deliveries are retried with exponential backoff for up to 24 hours. Endpoints must respond with a 2xx status within 10 seconds.

chunks.title: API rate limits
chunks.text: The REST API allows 600 requests per minute per key. Exceeding the rate limit returns HTTP 429 with a Retry-After header.

chunks.title: Data export
chunks.text: Workspace admins can export all data as CSV or JSON from Settings. Exports include projects, tasks, and audit logs.
